issue_title: [EFF-034] Implement replacement process execution loop + chooseReplacement decisions + one-apply-per-process rule
rendered_issue_body:
<!-- Generated by tools/spec_board_sync.ts from the approved story file. -->

_This issue is a synchronized projection of the approved story. Edit the story file, then rerun the sync tool instead of hand-editing authoritative sections here._

## Summary
Implement replacement-effect runtime: represent replaceable processes, find/apply replacements with priority ordering and decisions, prevent multiple application to the same process, and emit replacementApplied events for replay.

**Story ID:** `EFF-034`  
**Spec Version:** `v6`  
**Type:** `implementation`  
**Area:** `engine`  
**Priority:** `critical`  
**Status:** `approved`

## Authoritative Spec References
- 04-effect-runtime.s013 (Replacement effects)
- 04-effect-runtime.s019 (Effect logging)
- 18-acceptance-tests.s004 (Milestone 2 - first effect runtime)

## Scope
- Define ReplacementProcess shape and integrate into engine execution for replaceable processes (04-effect-runtime.s013).
- Implement executeReplaceableProcess loop: findApplicableReplacements, filter out usedReplacementIds, canApplyReplacement, chooseReplacementByPriorityOrDecision, transformProcessByReplacement (04-effect-runtime.s013).
- Implement PendingDecision.chooseReplacement for controller-chosen replacement ordering (04-effect-runtime.s013).
- Enforce: a replacement cannot apply twice to the same process.id, even if transformed (04-effect-runtime.s013).
- Emit replacementApplied event with original process ID, selected replacement ID, old/new payload hashes; at least replayOnly visibility (04-effect-runtime.s013, 04-effect-runtime.s019).

## Out of Scope
- Defining all replaceable process types across the engine (only wire the framework and at least one process for tests).
- UI display of replacement decisions.

## Dependencies
- ENG-015
- ENG-004

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Processing order: card/process being replaced first (if applicable), then turn player chosen order, then non-turn player chosen order (04-effect-runtime.s013).
- [ ] Optional replacements may be declined; mandatory replacements cannot be declined unless ordering among mandatory replacements is required (04-effect-runtime.s013).
- [ ] Replacement cannot apply twice to the same process.id (04-effect-runtime.s013, 18-acceptance-tests.s004 M2-021).
- [ ] Replacement choice uses chooseReplacement decision and logs replacementApplied (18-acceptance-tests.s004 M2-020).
- [ ] Replacement effect applies once per process (18-acceptance-tests.s004 M2-012).

## Required Tests
- Integration: M2-020 replacement choice pauses with chooseReplacement and emits replacementApplied.
- Integration: M2-021 attempt to reapply same replacement is prevented even across transformed process shapes.
- Golden: replacementApplied payload hashes are deterministic across runs.

## Repo Rules
- replacementApplied must be logged for replay determinism (04-effect-runtime.s013, 04-effect-runtime.s019).

## Ambiguity Policy
fail_and_escalate
